panels.title: Publication failures and retries
panels.description: Live-event publication failures indicate clients are entering degraded polling while the transactional outbox retains work.

targets.expr: _msg:"live event publication failed" | stats by (_time:1m) count() as failures

panels.title: Replay retention pressure
panels.description: Warning and hard replay-budget actions. Hard actions preserve live delivery and force canonical resync on reconnect.

targets.expr: (_msg:"live replay budget above warning threshold; retention tightened" OR _msg:"live replay budget reached; retention shed to minimal tail") | stats by (_time:5m) count() as trims
service:api AND (_msg:"live event publication failed" OR _msg:"failed to claim live event outbox rows" OR _msg:"live outbox listener disconnected" OR _msg:"failed to write terminal live event")
